description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a warm tan-brown upholstered seat and backrest, featuring a smooth, continuous curve that forms integrated armrests. The seat is generously padded and has a wide, open lower back cutout for ventilation and comfort. The chair sits atop a sturdy black metal base with five spokes, each ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is cylindrical and connects the seat to the base, likely containing a pneumatic or mechanical height adjustment mechanism, though no levers are visible. The upholstery appears to be faux leather or vinyl, giving the chair a sleek, matte finish. This chair is suitable for office, home, or urban public spaces, offering both comfort and functionality.
description: A tan-brown upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests, a curved backrest, and a black five-spoke wheeled base. The chair has a modern, comfortable design with a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved seat and backrest with integrated armrests and an open lower back cutout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's thick seat padding, the gentle backward slope of the backrest, and the black metal base with visible casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest curve and the full width of the chair's back, with the base and casters visible below.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the seat's depth, the armrest integration, and the sturdy five-spoke base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: Cylindrical black metal column, likely steel, connecting the seat to the five-spoke base; appears fixed with possible internal adjustment mechanism.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, gently curved backrest with integrated armrests, medium height, smooth tan upholstery, and an open lower back cutout.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, upholstered in the same material, seamlessly attached.
